use_codes.desc: TREATMENT IN COMBINATION WITH A CORTICOID SUCH AS PREDNISONE OF PROSTATE CANCER PREVIOUSLY TREATED WITH DOCETAXEL

INCREASING SURVIVAL IN METASTATIC CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER PATIENTS PREVIOUSLY TREATED WITH DOCETAXEL BY ADMINISTERING AS A 3 WEEK CYCLE CABAZITAXEL AFTER 5 MG DEXCHLORPHENIRAMINE, 8 MG DEXAMETHASONE, AND AN H2-ANTAGONIST

INCREASING SURVIVAL IN METASTATIC CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER PATIENTS PREVIOUSLY TREATED WITH DOCETAXEL BY ADMINISTERING 20 TO 25 MG/M2 CABAZITAXEL AFTER A PREMEDICATION REGIMEN THAT INCLUDES AN H2-ANTAGONIST

INCREASING SURVIVAL IN MCRPC PATIENTS PREVIOUSLY TREATED WITH DOCETAXEL BY ADMINISTERING CABAZITAXEL IN COMBINATION WITH PREDNISONE OR PREDNISOLONE AFTER A PREMEDICATION REGIMEN THAT INCLUDES AN ANTIHISTAMINE, A CORTICOSTEROID, AND AN H2-ANTAGONIST
